pi_items.source: setup_task.sh updates ExxonMobil and J&J to have past close dates while remaining in active stages. seed_data.php confirms no other deals match this criteria.

setup_task.sh introduces mismatched probabilities for 3 existing deals (NVIDIA, AT&T, Goldman Sachs) via UPDATE, but also creates 1 new active deal ('GE Aviation') with 'Needs Analysis' stage and 100% probability, resulting in 4 total mismatched opportunities.
setup_task.sh creates exactly one Closed Won deal ('Apple - ML Infrastructure Renewal') with a future close date (2027-06-15). All other Closed Won deals in seed_data.php have past dates.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated SuiteCRM data populated via PHP setup scripts. The agent acts as the VP of Sales in the Financial Services Technology industry. Verification of the database setup scripts confirms there are exactly 2 stale deals (ExxonMobil and J&J, which are in active stages but have past close dates) and exactly 1 Closed Won deal with a future close date ('Apple - ML Infrastructure Renewal'). The claim of 3 probability mismatches is contradicted; there are actually 4, as setup_task.sh explicitly alters 3 existing deals (NVIDIA, AT&T, Goldman Sachs) and creates 1 new active deal ('GE Aviation') with an incorrect 100% probability for its stage.
